reasoning: Under standard geometric Brownian motion assumptions for broad equity indices like the DJIA, the index exhibits positive expected returns alongside significant volatility. Since no specific multiple resolution dates were explicitly listed in the text, we provide a single estimate aligned with this default ~3-month forecasting horizon based on historical DJIA performance base-rates.
